checks.reason: The node is scoped to indications of bow-and-arrow use at Sibudu Cave 64 millennia ago.
The scoped evidence is inferred from stone artefacts and their context.
Application context should not be modeled as a direct technology prerequisite.
The current composite_tools node is scoped to KP1 hafted spears, not Sibudu archery.
Atlatl and archery are separate projectile systems unless a source supports a direct lineage.
